message:
type: PROPOSE
my_files: src/jinja2/ext.py
note: My task (translation metadata tracking) requires modifying InternationalizationExtension.parse() and _make_node() in src/jinja2/ext.py. What does your feature touch? If it also needs ext.py we should split by method/region.

type: REVISE
my_files: src/jinja2/ext.py
your_files: src/jinja2/ext.py
note: My task also only touches src/jinja2/ext.py: adding domain= param to trans tag (parse() domain parsing + validation, _make_node() dgettext/dngettext calls, _install_callables domain globals). True file-disjoint split isn't possible here since both features live in InternationalizationExtension. Proposal: we both edit ext.py but keep changes functionally separate - you handle metadata/context-related parsing+node branches, I handle domain-related parsing+node branches. I'll only touch: the parse() parameter-parsing loop (adding a domain-specific branch), _make_node() (adding domain-aware gettext/ngettext call construction), and _install_callables (adding dgettext/dngettext to globals). I won't touch any metadata/context-specific code you add. Let me know if that works or if you'd rather go first/second sequentially on this file.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: src/jinja2/ext.py
your_files: src/jinja2/ext.py
note: Agreed: functional split within shared file. I will only touch: parse() metadata-parameter parsing branch (note/created/modified) and _make_node() metadata dict param + trans_metadata attribute assignment. I won't touch domain-related parsing, dgettext/dngettext call construction, or _install_callables. Will keep edits minimal/localized to reduce merge conflicts.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: src/jinja2/ext.py
your_files: src/jinja2/ext.py
note: Confirmed. I'll stick to domain parsing/dgettext-dngettext/_install_callables only, won't touch metadata/note/created/modified code. Starting implementation now.

type: DONE
my_files: src/jinja2/ext.py
note: Metadata feature implemented: added _TRANS_METADATA_KEYS constant, metadata parsing branch in parse() (note/created/modified with string-literal validation and error messages), metadata param threaded through _make_node() setting output_node.trans_metadata when non-empty. Full test suite (830 tests) passes. Wrote patch.txt with git diff. Done touching ext.py - all yours for domain work.

type: DONE
my_files: src/jinja2/ext.py
note: Domain feature implemented: domain="literal" parsing in parse() (with duplicate/non-literal validation errors), dgettext/dngettext node generation in _make_node(), and dgettext/dngettext wiring through _install/_install_null/_install_callables/_uninstall plus new _make_new_dgettext/_make_new_dngettext newstyle wrappers. Full test suite (830 tests) passes. Wrote patch.txt. Thanks for the clean split!
